description_long: This forklift features a robust, industrial design with a predominantly yellow and black color scheme, typical of construction vehicles. The front is equipped with two long, parallel fork arms extending outward, supported by a heavy-duty mast and hydraulic lifting mechanism. The operator's compartment is protected by a sturdy overhead guard made of metal bars, and the seat is centrally positioned with visible controls and a steering wheel. The vehicle rides on four solid wheels, with the rear section housing the engine compartment and counterweight, both encased in a rugged, angular shell. The exterior surfaces show signs of wear and use, with some scuff marks and dirt, especially on the lower sections and fork arms. Safety features such as warning stripes and protective grilles are visible, but no illuminated warning lights are apparent.
description: A heavy-duty yellow and black forklift with long fork arms, a protective overhead guard, and a rugged, industrial build. The operator's seat is centrally located, and the vehicle shows signs of use and wear.
description_view_0: Front view showing the two long fork arms, the protective overhead guard, and the operator's seat behind the mast.
description_view_1: Left side view highlighting the full length of the fork arms, the hydraulic mast assembly, and the detailed operator compartment.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the engine compartment, counterweight, and rear wheels, with the overhead guard visible above.
description_view_3: Right side view similar to the left, showing the fork arms, mast, and operator area, with additional detail on the hydraulic components.
attribute_fork_arms: The forklift has two straight, parallel fork arms made of thick steel, each extending forward from the mast. They are long and rectangular with a flat upper surface and squared-off tips, showing visible wear and scuff marks. The arms are positioned low to the ground and are spaced to accommodate standard pallets. No attachments or adjustability features are visible.
attribute_overhead_guard: The overhead guard is constructed from black metal bars forming a rectangular protective cage above the operator's seat. It covers the entire operator area, providing protection from falling objects, and features a mesh or grille design on the sides for added safety. The structure appears sturdy and is securely attached to the main body.
attribute_mast: The mast is a double-stage vertical assembly made of heavy steel, with visible hydraulic cylinders and lift chains on either side. It is robust and supports the lifting and lowering of the fork arms. The mast is painted black and shows some signs of use, with protective grilles and mechanical linkages visible.
attribute_operator_seat: The operator seat is centrally located, medium-sized, and appears to be made of black fabric or vinyl with a contoured backrest. It has no visible armrests or headrest, but a seatbelt is present. The seat is mounted on a metal base and is positioned behind the steering wheel and control levers.
attribute_warning_lights: No visible warning lights are present on the forklift. There are no illuminated or colored lights on the exterior or operator area.
